company.name: Krucx Technologies LTD
company.positioning: AI-powered digital agency focused on websites, business automation, marketing, mobile applications, and ERP solutions.

pricing_ranges.note: These are indicative ranges. Final pricing depends on scope, complexity, and integrations. A free quote is always available at https://krucx.de/get-a-free-quote/

web_development.ecommerce_store: €2,000–€10,000+ depending on product catalog size and integrations

erp_solutions.odoo_setup: €3,000–€12,000 depending on modules (HR, accounting, inventory, etc.)

marketing.seo_monthly: €500–€2,000/month depending on competition and target market

steps: 1. Discovery call — understand your business, goals, and pain points (free)
2. Proposal — scoped solution with timeline and fixed price quote
3. Design phase — wireframes and UI mockups for approval
4. Development — iterative builds with regular client check-ins
5. Testing & QA — thorough testing before launch
6. Launch & handover — full training and documentation
7. Ongoing support — available on retainer or as-needed basis

faq.do_you_work_internationally: Yes, Krucx works with clients across Europe, Middle East, and globally. Most of our work is done remotely. We have clients in Germany, UK, UAE, Pakistan, and beyond.
faq.what_makes_you_different: We combine technical development with AI and automation expertise. Unlike typical agencies, we don't just build — we help businesses actually reduce costs and save time with smart systems. We've served 1,200+ clients since 2016.
faq.do_you_offer_ongoing_support: Yes, we offer monthly retainer packages for hosting, maintenance, updates, and support. We can also be available on an as-needed hourly basis.
faq.can_you_integrate_with_existing_systems: Absolutely. We integrate with Shopify, WooCommerce, Odoo, SAP, HubSpot, Salesforce, Zapier, and most major platforms via API.
faq.do_you_sign_ndas: Yes, we sign NDAs on request before sharing sensitive project details.
faq.do_you_have_a_portfolio: Yes, our portfolio is at https://krucx.de/portfolio/ — we have case studies across logistics, ecommerce, healthcare, and manufacturing.
faq.how_do_i_get_started: The quickest way is to fill out our project form at https://krucx.de/start-a-project/ or get a free quote at https://krucx.de/get-a-free-quote/. You can also WhatsApp or email us directly.
faq.do_you_use_templates_or_custom_code: Both — we use premium templates when they fit the budget and goal, and build custom from scratch when needed. We always recommend the most cost-effective approach for your situation.
faq.what_technologies_do_you_use: Python, React, Next.js, Node.js, Shopify, WordPress, Flutter (mobile), Odoo, PostgreSQL, AWS, and more. We pick the right tool for the job.
faq.can_you_help_with_a_small_budget: Yes, we have solutions at different price points. A basic landing page starts from €500. We always try to find an approach that fits the budget and delivers real value.
faq.how_much_does_a_website_cost: Depends on what you need. A simple landing page starts around €500–1,500. A full business website is typically €1,500–5,000. An ecommerce store ranges from €2,000–10,000+. We give fixed-price quotes after a short discovery call — no surprises.
faq.how_long_does_a_project_take: A landing page takes 1–2 weeks. A full website 2–4 weeks. An ecommerce store 4–8 weeks. A mobile app or ERP implementation is typically 2–5 months. We give you a clear timeline upfront.
faq.do_you_build_shopify_stores: Yes, Shopify is one of our specialties. We build custom Shopify themes, integrate apps, set up payment gateways, and handle product imports. We also work with WooCommerce and Magento.
faq.can_you_build_an_ai_chatbot: Yes, AI chatbots are one of our key services. We build chatbots for customer support, lead qualification, WhatsApp, and website chat. Integration with your CRM or backend is included.
faq.do_you_do_seo: Yes, we offer technical SEO, on-page optimization, content strategy, and local SEO. Monthly retainers start from €500/month with clear reporting.

logistics: Automated email-to-order processing system for a UK freight forwarder — eliminated 4 hours of daily manual data entry
SAP integration and dispatcher dashboard for a German logistics company with 50+ trucks
WhatsApp-based shipment tracking bot for a courier service
ecommerce: Custom Shopify store with 2,000+ products and ERP inventory sync for a fashion brand
AI product recommendation engine integrated into a WooCommerce store (35% uplift in average order value)
Full-stack marketplace platform for a UAE-based electronics distributor
healthcare: Online booking and appointment reminder system for a chain of dental clinics (reduced no-shows by 40%)
Patient portal with automated follow-up messaging for a physiotherapy practice
manufacturing: Odoo ERP implementation covering HR, payroll, inventory, and production tracking for a 120-person factory
Quality control reporting dashboard integrated with existing production line software
restaurants: Online reservation and loyalty program system for a restaurant group with 5 locations
WhatsApp ordering bot for a cloud kitchen
